parameters.//: Day 2 slim user-access parameters. Replace the placeholders, then run ./scripts/grant-user-access-day2.ps1.

value.//: One entry per participant or per Entra security group of participants.

sandeepAzureOpenAIName.//: Name (NOT endpoint) of Sandeep's Day 1 Azure OpenAI account. Lab 03 calls embeddings + chat from this. Leave blank to skip the AOAI grant.

sandeepAzureOpenAIResourceGroup.//: Resource group of Sandeep's AOAI. Empty = same RG as the Day 2 deployment.
